description: Single source of truth for acronyms used in the RSTU iPad slides webapp. Long-forms MUST originate from a client source below. Never add expansions based on assumption.

pptx.path: Slide points for RSTU from client/Presentation RSTU 14 April 2026 - Program Semarakkan Inovasi.pptx
pptx.note: Client's primary RSTU deck for the 14 April 2026 event. Authoritative for RSTU branding and current product names. 25 slides.

slaid_pdf.note: Earlier RSTU briefing deck, authored by Saiful Azri via Canva, dated 3 August 2025. 18 pages. Official client source. Contains detailed H.E.M.A.T values and KPPA/PKSN source citations not present in the pptx.

talking_point_sub.path: Teduh - General/Talking Point SUB - Podcast JPA 070426.pdf (also earlier version at 'Talking Point SUB/Talking Point SUB - Podcast JPA 060426.pdf')
talking_point_sub.note: Nota percakapan for SUB (Setiausaha Bahagian Korporat) PSUK Selangor, for JPA podcast session on Program Semarakkan Inovasi Sektor Awam Tahun 2026. Authoritative for AINS/MPIPANS/MMKN/MyIPO/UiTM/SRIE/metaSEL/Hab metaSEL definitions, OTS commercialization history (MY-198326-A patent, Selgem Sdn. Bhd. licensing, SRIE 2023 pioneer product), and TEDUH details. Uses the abbreviated form 'Reformasi Sistem Tadbir Urus' for RSTU.

innovasi_pack.note: Client-provided product-specific PDFs delivered 2026-04-12. Contains HAB metaSEL portal pages for SPKB/MyMR/OTS, the ABT Tracker inovasi report from PDT Petaling, EMC OTS product sheet, and the MyMR FASTER MPIPANS 2025 report. Authoritative for detailed product descriptions and group names.

handoff.note: Internal production handoff doc. Contains client-verified product name corrections (e.g. STKB → SPKB). Secondary source for acronym pairings where pptx/pdf are silent.

event_master.reason: Derived from a Whisper transcript of meeting audio. Not authoritative — transcription errors possible (e.g. 'Overflow Triple System' is wrong; pptx says 'Overflow Tripping System'). Any acronym expansion that appears only in EVENT-MASTER.md must NOT be treated as a client source.

acronyms.longForm: Reformasi Sistem Penyampaian & Tadbir Urus Negeri Selangor
acronyms.sourceDetail: Slide 1 cover image, Slide 15 Kerangka framework
acronyms.notes: Latest authoritative name per pptx. Also confirmed in SLAID PDF page 1 cover and page 17 org chart.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Slide 2 (Punca Kuasa Pelaksanaan)
Slide 2 (Punca Kuasa Pelaksanaan)
Slide 2 (Punca Kuasa Pelaksanaan)
acronyms.notes: Appears twice in slide 2 hierarchy (federal and state level).

acronyms.sourceDetail: Derived from PKSN expansion on page 8 ('Sumber: Pejabat Ketua Setiausaha Negara (PKSN)')
acronyms.notes: KSN itself not literally defined; derived from PKSN = Pejabat + Ketua Setiausaha Negara.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Page 9 HEMAT slide source line: 'Sumber: Ketua Pengarah Perkhidmatan Awam (KPPA)'
Page 8 Agenda Reformasi source line: 'Sumber: Pejabat Ketua Setiausaha Negara (PKSN)'
Slide 7 FS 7: 'diterajui oleh Cawangan Pengurusan Strategik (SIAP)'
acronyms.notes: Only the acronym-to-name mapping is given; letters not further decomposed.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Page 17 org chart: 'KPI Reformasi Kerenah Birokrasi (RKB)'
acronyms.notes: Also visible on the RKB 2025 compilation cover page image bundled with the pptx (image18.png).

acronyms.sourceDetail: Page 17 org chart: 'Strategi Keberhasilan Reformasi (SKR) RSTU'. Also labelled in Kerangka frame pages 11 and image5.png.
Page 11 Kerangka top row: 'Rancangan Selangor (RS-1 & RS-2)'
acronyms.notes: Used in RS-1 and RS-2 state planning contexts. Not referenced in the pptx.

acronyms.longForm: Hijrah Tatakelola, Empati Rakyat, Minda Pekin, Apresiasi Inovasi, Telus Tadbiran
acronyms.sourceDetail: Page 9 'NILAI-NILAI PENJAWAT AWAM — H.E.M.A.T', sourced from Ketua Pengarah Perkhidmatan Awam (KPPA)
acronyms.notes: Official JPA framework for values of public servants. Each letter has a detailed description on page 9.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Slide 15 Kerangka framework image (image5.png) 'Nilai' row. Also detailed on SLAID page 12.
acronyms.notes: RSTU reform values framework.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Slide 23: 'Sistem Penguatkuasaan Bersepadu (SPKB)'. Also confirmed in innovasi_pack HAB metaSEL SPKB page, HANDOFF.md line 47.
acronyms.notes: Owned by Majlis Perbandaran Hulu Selangor, Jabatan Penguatkuasaan. Group: ASPIRE. Previously called STKB in draft materials (deprecated).

acronyms.sourceDetail: Slide 24: 'Overflow Tripping System (OTS)'. Also confirmed in innovasi_pack HAB metaSEL OTS page and EMC OTS product sheet.
acronyms.notes: Owned by Pejabat Setiausaha Kerajaan Negeri Selangor. Group: EMC. Created 2007. See discrepancies section — EVENT-MASTER.md has the wrong expansion 'Overflow Triple System' but that doc is not a client source.

acronyms.sourceDetail: ABT Tracker - PDT Petaling.pdf page 3 section 3.3: 'Akaun Belum Terima (ABT) ialah satu amaun yang sepatutnya diterima tetapi belum diterima oleh Kerajaan'
acronyms.notes: Financial/accounting term for receivables. ABT Tracker is a GIS-based tool to identify overdue tax locations. Group: TAXPERT SQUAD.

acronyms.sourceDetail: LAPORAN FASTER - MY MR.pdf: 'Permit Kerja Kecil (Minor Repair - MR)'. Also in HAB metaSEL MyMR page.
acronyms.notes: MyMR is the online application system for MR permits. Group: FASTER. The LAPORAN FASTER doc also uses 'Minor Renovation/Repair' interchangeably.

acronyms.sourceDetail: ABT Tracker - PDT Petaling.pdf page 2 section 3.2: 'Kumpulan Inovatif dan Kreatif (KIK) Pejabat Daerah dan Tanah Petaling'

acronyms.longForm: Majlis Persada Inovasi Perkhidmatan Awam Negeri Selangor
acronyms.sourceDetail: LAPORAN FASTER - MY MR.pdf page 1: 'MAJLIS PERSADA INOVASI PERKHIDMATAN AWAM NEGERI SELANGOR TAHUN 2025'
acronyms.notes: Annual state-level public service innovation council/event. MyMR won Naib Johan (Runner-up) in the Inovasi Penyampaian Perkhidmatan (Penambahbaikan) category 2025.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Referenced in all HAB metaSEL portal pages footer: 'Keputusan AINS'. SPKB was submitted under 'ains' kategori penyertaan.
acronyms.notes: Annual state-level innovation award.

acronyms.sourceDetail: ABT Tracker - PDT Petaling.pdf page 3: 'kaedah GIS (Geographic Information System)'
acronyms.notes: ABT Tracker is built on GIS (using Mapinfo and QGIS software).

acronyms.sourceDetail: LAPORAN FASTER - MY MR.pdf: 'KEMENTERIAN PERUMAHAN DAN KERAJAAN TEMPATAN (KPKT)'
LAPORAN FASTER - MY MR.pdf ringkasan eksekutif: 'Sejajar dengan Fokus Rancangan Malaysia Ke-12 (RMK-12)'
ABT Tracker - PDT Petaling.pdf page 3 figure 1: 'ABT Wang Pendahuluan Kontraktor (WPK)'

HAB metaSEL SPKB page lists 'Majlis Perbandaran Hulu Selangor' as the owner of SPKB. The abbreviation MPHS is used in HANDOFF.md lines 47, 63, 64 and in the SPKB doc context ('Jabatan Penguatkuasaan, MPHS').

acronyms.longForm: Majlis Mesyuarat Kerajaan Negeri Selangor Darul Ehsan
acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 7: 'Majlis Mesyuarat Kerajaan Negeri Selangor Darul Ehsan (MMKN)'. Also para 15 for OTS RSTU approval in 2025.
acronyms.notes: The state-level executive council that approves government decisions. 'MMKN Ke 34/2025' in pptx slide 23 refers to the 34th MMKN meeting of 2025.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 8: 'Perbadanan Harta Intelek Malaysia (MyIPO)'
acronyms.notes: Federal agency PSUK has a strategic MoU with, for innovation commercialization.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 8: 'Universiti Teknologi MARA (UiTM)'
acronyms.notes: Federal public university PSUK has a strategic MoU with, for innovation projects.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 14: 'Selangor R&D and Innovation Expo 2023 (SRIE 2023)'
acronyms.notes: Annual state R&D and innovation exposition. OTS was officially named Produk Rintis Pengkomersilan Inovasi PSUK Selangor at SRIE 2023, launched by YAB Dato' Menteri Besar Selangor.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 9: 'agenda Metamorfosis Selangor (metaSEL)'
acronyms.notes: State-level digital transformation agenda. 'Hab metaSEL' is the physical/digital hub supporting this agenda. Exact casing: 'metaSEL' (lowercase m, uppercase SEL).

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 9-11: 'Hab metaSEL merupakan sebuah inisiatif strategik... diwujudkan sebagai satu platform untuk menghimpun, menyelaras dan memperkasakan pelbagai produk inovasi, digital dan teknologi di Negeri Selangor'
acronyms.notes: NOT 'Hub Metasel'. Correct casing is 'Hab metaSEL'. Launched by PSUK in 2025. Hosts AINS and MPIPANS innovation products. Serves as digital pameran + pusat maklumat setempat.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 2: 'Anugerah Inovasi Perdana Sektor Awam (AIPSA) yang dilaksanakan oleh Kerajaan Persekutuan'
acronyms.notes: Federal equivalent of AINS. AINS-SA scoring aligned with AIPSA.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 2: 'AINS Sektor Awam (AINS-SA)' — kategori khas dengan 4 trek: sosial, ekonomi, infrastruktur, keselamatan & pentadbiran.

acronyms.longForm: Majlis Persada Inovasi Perkhidmatan Awam Peringkat Negeri Selangor
acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 4 header: 'MAJLIS PERSADA INOVASI PERKHIDMATAN AWAM PERINGKAT NEGERI SELANGOR (MPIPANS) TAHUN 2025'
acronyms.notes: UPDATE: the word 'PERINGKAT' is in the Talking Point SUB PDF but was omitted in the innovasi_pack LAPORAN FASTER MyMR doc. Use 'Majlis Persada Inovasi Perkhidmatan Awam Peringkat Negeri Selangor' as authoritative. Biennial innovation contest based on Kumpulan Inovatif dan Kreatif (KIK) Horizon Baharu format. 35 kumpulan inovasi participated in 2025.

acronyms.sourceDetail: HAB metaSEL SPKB page footer: 'Bangunan SSAAS, 40503 Shah Alam'. Also Talking Point SUB PDF para 14: 'Bangunan Sultan Salahuddin Abdul Aziz Shah'.
acronyms.notes: The main PSUK building in Shah Alam — where OTS was first installed in 2007.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 8: 'menjalinkan kerjasama strategik melalui MoU'
acronyms.notes: Standard English abbreviation used in the doc without expansion.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Talking Point SUB PDF para 1: 'pelajar Institut Pengajian Tinggi (IPT)'
Slide 24 (OTS agensi pelaksana: 'Majlis Bandaraya Shah Alam')
Slide 24 (OTS agensi pelaksana)
Slide 24 (OTS agensi pelaksana)
Slide 24 (OTS agensi pelaksana)
HANDOFF.md line 63
acronyms.notes: pptx slide 23 uses the full name.

acronyms.sourceDetail: HANDOFF.md line 63
acronyms.notes: pptx slide 23 uses the full name.

acronyms.sourceDetail: HANDOFF.md line 64
acronyms.notes: pptx slide 23 uses the full name. HANDOFF uses 'MPSp' (lower-case p) to avoid conflict with MPS (Selayang).

acronyms.sourceDetail: HANDOFF.md line 64
HANDOFF.md line 64 (MyMR pelaksana list)
acronyms.notes: pptx slide 23 uses the full name 'Majlis Perbandaran Selayang'.

acronyms.sourceDetail: Slide 24: 'Pejabat Daerah Dan Tanah Petaling', 'Pejabat Daerah Dan Tanah Klang', etc.
Slide 24 uses full name 'Pejabat Setiausaha Kerajaan Negeri Selangor' as OTS lead agency; Slide 25 uses 'PSUK' as the agency-bucket column header.
acronyms.notes: PSUK short form is not literally defined as 'PSUK = ...' but the mapping is unambiguous from slides 24-25 pairing.

undefined.reason: Appears in pptx slides 2, 20-24 as a product name, and in HANDOFF.md line 181, but never expanded in any client source.
undefined.instruction: Do NOT expand. Display acronym only.

undefined.reason: Listed as a Produk Reformasi in pptx slide 2 alongside ARPA/RKB/H.E.M.A.T/RSTU, and appears in SLAID page 11 kerangka top row, but never expanded.
undefined.instruction: Do NOT expand. Display acronym only.

undefined.reason: RESOLVED — now defined as Ketua Pengarah Perkhidmatan Awam (see acronyms list, sourced from SLAID page 9).
RESOLVED — now defined as Majlis Mesyuarat Kerajaan Negeri Selangor Darul Ehsan (Talking Point SUB PDF para 7).
Used throughout pptx slide 25 and HANDOFF.md, never formally expanded in client sources.
undefined.instruction: Do NOT expand. Display acronym only.

undefined.reason: RESOLVED — MR is now defined as Minor Repair (innovasi_pack, LAPORAN FASTER - MY MR.pdf). MyMR reads as 'My' + 'MR' = 'My Minor Repair'. See 'MR' entry in acronyms list.
undefined.instruction: Display as 'MyMR' (prefix 'My' is app branding, not an acronym).

undefined.reason: RESOLVED — ABT = Akaun Belum Terima (innovasi_pack, ABT Tracker - PDT Petaling.pdf). See acronyms list.
Used as 'SUK Selangor' in pptx slide 2. Setiausaha Kerajaan is implied (PSUK = Pejabat Setiausaha Kerajaan) but SUK on its own is not formally expanded.

Used as 'FS 1' through 'FS 8' for the 8 Fokus Strategik in pptx slides 4–7. Stands for Fokus Strategik (implied by section header 'FOKUS STRATEGIK RSTU') but not formally defined as 'FS = Fokus Strategik'.
undefined.instruction: Display as 'FS 1..8'. Title 'Fokus Strategik' is the slide section header.

undefined.reason: Used in SLAID PDF page 17 org chart as 'TSUK (Pengurusan)'. Not expanded in the slide.
undefined.instruction: Do NOT expand. Display as 'TSUK (Pengurusan)' in org-chart contexts only.

undefined.reason: Used in SLAID PDF pages 14, 16 as 'Indeks SRI' and 'Laporan SRI Selangor 2025'. Not expanded.
undefined.instruction: Do NOT expand. Only appears in PDF survey results section not currently shown in the webapp.

undefined.reason: Used in SLAID PDF page 6 as 'SISPAA Selangor'. Not expanded in the slide.
undefined.instruction: Do NOT expand. Only appears in PDF stats section not currently shown in the webapp.

undefined.reason: Used in SLAID PDF page 13 as 'Ketua Jabatan (HOD)'. This is an English abbreviation, not a Malay acronym.
undefined.instruction: If needed, display as 'HOD (Head of Department)' or 'Ketua Jabatan'.

variants.longForm: Reformasi Sistem Penyampaian & Tadbir Urus Negeri Selangor
variants.source: pptx slide 1 cover image, SLAID PDF page 1 cover
Talking Point SUB PDF para 6 ('Reformasi Sistem Tadbir Urus (RSTU)'), remotion-video/src/theme.ts:58
variants.status: OUTDATED abbreviated form — do not use

discrepancies.resolution: Per user directive 'For RSTU itself, the latest name is as per the pptx slides', use full form 'Reformasi Sistem Penyampaian & Tadbir Urus Negeri Selangor'. The Talking Point SUB PDF uses an older abbreviated form that drops 'Penyampaian' — this must be corrected in the remotion voiceover script and theme.ts.

variants.longForm: Majlis Persada Inovasi Perkhidmatan Awam Negeri Selangor

Use 'Overflow Tripping System' per pptx slide 24.

variants.source: pptx slide 13 image (4 Indeks Pengukuran Utama)

discrepancies.resolution: Webapp uses the 6 Selangor-specific cabaran from pptx slide 9 (the current AS-IS snapshot). The 7 generic cabaran from SLAID page 5 is an older framing.
